title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 233.110 - Board may plant shade trees — erect signboards
text:
233.110.  Board may plant shade trees — erect signboards. — Said board may plant, protect and cultivate ornamental and shade trees along the sides of roads within its district, and erect and keep erected and repaired such signboards in its district at places it may deem proper therefor.
(RSMo 1939 § 8697) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 8048; 1919 § 10824; 1909 § 10602
